title: Q2 2026 earnings call: Remarks from our CEO
summary: Our momentum starts with Search, where people are adopting one seamless search experience across AI Overviews and AI Mode. Next, the Gemini app, which now has 950 million monthly active users, with daily active users tripling in the last year.
